concerns: Step 6: The plan says to 'remove only truly dead quality properties' but doesn't explicitly list which ones to remove (maxPolyhedra, latticeGridSize, latticeCellSize, latticeVoidDensity, latticeJitter) vs keep (enableElectricArc, arcSubdivisions). Making this explicit would reduce implementation error risk.
Step 6 omits cleanup of the `extractSystemConfig` cases for 'wirepolyhedra' and 'cubelattice' in quality.ts — the risks section mentions it but no plan step covers it.

The plan doesn't mention cleaning up the `primaryCountForSystem` references to `maxPolyhedra` and `gridSize` quality properties in compoundModes.ts when removing those switch cases — these are coupled to the quality property cleanup in step 6.
